DATuM

  • View page source

parser.py

Introduces two parser classes: datum.parser.InputFile and datum.parser.PoseFile, responsible for parsing and loading the input and pose measurement files, respectively.

class datum.parser.InputFile

Parses and caches the user input data as a singleton instance.

Variables:

data (InputData) – The input file data.

load_data()

Loads and caches input data.

Return type:

None

class datum.parser.PoseFile

Parses and chaches the pose measurement data collected for each BeVERLI stereo PIV plane during the corresponding experiment in the Virginia Tech Stability Wind Tunnel.

Variables:

data (PoseMeasurement) – The pose measurement data.

load_data()

Loads and caches the pose measurement data.

Return type:

None
